welcome.title: Set up your hub
welcome.subtitle: Brika is a self-hosted automation hub. The next steps create your admin account and capture a bit of context about your environment so workflows know where and when to run.

language.title: Pick your language
language.subtitle: Sets the language for the dashboard, plugin notifications, and emails. You can change it any time in Settings.

account.title: Create your admin account
account.subtitle: The first account on a Brika hub is the administrator. You can invite more users later from Settings.
account.name: Full name
account.editSubtitle: Update your name or password before continuing.
account.signInSubtitle: An admin account already exists for this hub. Sign in to finish setting it up.
account.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Check your credentials and try again.

avatar.title: Add a profile photo
avatar.subtitle: Optional. Useful when several people share admin access to the same hub. You can change it any time.
avatar.uploadFailed: Couldn't upload. Please try a different image.

timezone.title: Set your timezone
timezone.subtitle: Brika uses this to schedule automations and stamp events. Pre-filled from your browser, but you can change it.

location.title: Where is your hub?
location.subtitle: Plugins like Weather and Sun Position need to know where the hub physically is. The address stays on this machine. It is never shared.
location.emptyHint: Search for an address above, or detect your position from the browser.

update.title: Check for updates
update.checking: Checking GitHub for the latest release…
update.upToDateSubtitle: v{{version}} is current. Continue when you're ready.
update.devBuildSubtitle: v{{version}} is ahead of any published release. Auto-updates are off — you're driving.
update.channelMismatchSubtitle: v{{current}} is a canary build — there's nothing newer on the {{channel}} channel.
update.channelMismatchHelp: If you want to keep receiving canary updates, switch the update channel back to canary from Settings → System → Updates.
update.availableSubtitle: Upgrade now to start on the latest version. You can also skip and update later from Settings → System.
update.applyingSubtitle: Downloading and applying the new release. Don't close this tab.
update.restartingSubtitle: The new version is installed. We're waiting for it to come back online.
update.restartingReloadHint: We'll reload automatically when the hub is ready
update.restartingSlow: This is taking longer than usual. If nothing changes in another minute, reload the page manually.
update.waitingForHub: Waiting for the hub to come back up…
update.restartTimeout: The hub didn't come back in time. Reload the page and try again from Settings → System.

complete.title: You're ready
complete.subtitle: Configuration saved. Next stop: install your first plugin from the dashboard.
